title: UST
text: UST Uniface Server Type. The name of a particular Uniface server or client, as specified in the assignment file of the Uniface Router. Related Links Uniface Router A multithreaded deployment engine that routes requests of Uniface clients and Uniface servers. Uniface Server A server-based process that enables Uniface clients to access remote resources, or to execute remote components. By default, the Uniface Server acts as the Uniface Virtual Machine, and supports remote application invocation and remote data access. The Uniface Router is responsible for all communication between the client and server, except for exclusive Uniface Servers. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
